## Lotus memory check 🌸

> **Does this memory help us understand the cause without taking choice away from the person?**

- [ ] The change does not turn retrieved memory into approval, permission, execution, delivery, or merge authority.

- [ ] Durable claims remain connected to inspectable evidence and can be challenged, superseded, or rejected.
